esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
// Connection time (TCP connect to backend) at backend/server level
| WHERE haproxy.connections.average_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_ctime = MAX(haproxy.connections.average_time)
  BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name, haproxy.addr
// Threshold in ms — adjust for your baseline (100ms typical)
| WHERE max_ctime > 100
| EVAL alert_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(haproxy.proxy_name), "::", TO_STRING(haproxy.service_name), "::", COALESCE(TO_STRING(haproxy.addr), ""))
| SORT max_ctime DESC
| LIMIT 50
